exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, mid-plate. Full depth — thighs past 90°. Do not lock knees at top.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, soft knee bend. Feel hamstring stretch before driving hips forward.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Full extension, hold 1 sec at top. No swinging.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Curl fully, control the eccentric (3 sec down).

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full range — deep stretch at bottom, full contraction at top. Slow eccentric.
